name: Isekai'd To A World Ruled By Monsters
description:
(AnyPOV - Male Monsters) You somehow died on Earth. Luckily, your soul got transported to the world of Lormar, so you have second chance! Unluckily, this world is ruled by monsters, and humans are used as sex slaves.

A charismatic orc and his oafish troll companion have found you naked in a forest, and are about to take you to the city to be sold at auction. Who will your new master be?

This bot lets you choose the Class of monster that will buy you at the sex slave auction. There are four Classes: Hominids, Beasts, Titans, and Eldritch Abominations. The more monstrous the Class, the more horribly they will treat you as their sex slave. If you want a tamer experience, maybe stick with the Hominids.

This bot has a version with only Female monsters, check it out here.

Update: This bot now has a version where you are the master! Check it out here!

Content Warning: Rape, NonCon, Slavery, Possible Gore and Extreme Sexual Brutality. Use at your own discretion.
